title: Swords Are Better
description: This mod adds 9 new enchantments and 1 curse to spice up your sword with new enchants! This mod also adds a new bleeding out feature, where whenever you hit a mob, it blleds out for 3 seconds, and deals slowness. SWORDS ARE BETTER!
body:
Welcome to the **Swords Are Better** Mod! This mod adds 9 new enchants and 1 new curse for your sword, this also adds a new bleeding out feature to the sword on each hit!

**--Bleeding Out Sword Tweak--**

- Every time you hit a mob with a sword, it deals slowness and custom bleeding particles for 3 seconds, dealing a bit more damage overall

**--Breaching--**

- Has 5 levels to it
- A chance to breach shields with each sword hit
- Chance to breach increases by 12.5% with Breaching 2 and goes up to 5
- Base level one is 15%

**--Withering--**

- Inflicts the wither effect on the mob for 4 seconds when hit
- Has 2 levels to it
- Effect multiplies by two when at Withering 2

**--Vortex--**

- Pulls in other mobs around you when you have killed one
- Has 3 levels to it
- The range of pulling in mobs increases by each level

**--Soulfire Aspect--**

- Exactly like Fire Aspect but with the cool Soulfire look to it with soul sand particles

**--Shining--**

- Has 3 levels to it
- Blinds the entity sometimes when hitting one for 4 seconds
- Each level increases the blinding time by 2 seconds

**--Parry--**

- Has only 1 level to it
- Sometimes when fighting another mob, you can parry the attack and get a crit on them!

**--Frostbite--**

- Whenever you hit the mob with this, it freezes them for 4 seconds
- Has 2 levels for it
- The seconds multiply by 2 when at Frostbite 2
- Almost the same to Withering

**--Curse of Featherblade--**

- Makes your sword useless if you have this curse

**--Executioner--**

- Has only 1 level to it
- Insta-kills any mob with this enchant (even the warden)
- Really rare to get (3.5% for enchanting table, and 10% for villagers)

**--Bloodsuck--**

- Has 5 levels to it
- You gain Regeneration from each hit
- Regeneration goes up to 5 when having Bloodsuck 5
- Gives the mob hit with this Hunger and Poison
- With Bloodsuck 5, the debuffs for the mob hit get worse too

Mod also supports all enchants on enchanting tables and on villagers.

**Made by MaceMeta**
